text: Aurora Serverless Concepts @ bssiseamcantitia (©) sorancan e Scalable - ACU - Aurora Capacity Units e Aurora Serverless cluster has a MIN & MAX ACU e Cluster adjusts based on load e Can go to 0 and be paused * Consumption billing per-second basis * Same resilience as Aurora (6 copies across AZs)
